_publications._publicationTitle: Neurofibromin-deficient fibroblasts fail to form perineurium in vitro.

_contextSnippet: Cultures with Nf1 (+/−) fibroblasts contained 60% as many fascicles as wild-type cultures.
details: Nf1 (+/-) fibroblasts contained 60% as many fascicles as wild-type cultures at 30 days in vitro
